headline: Take-Two Interactive (TTWO) Stock Weighs GTA VI Hopes Against Rich Valuation Ratios
summary: If you are wondering whether Take-Two Interactive Software is priced attractively today, a useful starting point is understanding how its current share price lines up against several valuation methods. The stock recently closed at US$239.28, with returns of 13.0% over the past week, 1.1% over the past month, a decline of 4.9% year to date, and gains of 0.4% over 1 year, 68.7% over 3 years and 37.7% over 5 years. headline: Take Two Interactive Software (TTWO) Stock Could Be 13.6% Undervalued After GTA VI Preorder News
summary: Take-Two Interactive Software (TTWO) moved into focus after confirming that Grand Theft Auto VI preorders will open on June 25, a key milestone that helped ease delay worries and lifted investor sentiment. See our latest analysis for Take-Two Interactive Software. The GTA VI preorder news comes after a strong short term move, with a 1 day share price return of 4.93% and 7 day share price return of 13.00%. headline: Take-Two Interactive Software (TTWO) Is Up 12.9% After Locking In GTA VI Preorder Date - What's Changed
summary: Rockstar Games and Take-Two Interactive recently confirmed that Grand Theft Auto VI preorders will open on June 25, 2026, ahead of a planned November 19, 2026 console release, easing long-running concerns about further delays. This preorder timing, combined with intense consumer interest built up since the last GTA installment, has become central to how investors assess Take-Two’s near-term pipeline and revenue mix. We’ll now examine how locking in the Grand Theft Auto VI preorder date could...
